# SettleWire

> Prediction markets news, contextualized. We cluster coverage of each event
> from 90+ outlets, credit the first reporter, and add original analysis of
> why it matters for traders, operators, and regulation watchers. All article
> text is our own original writing; every story links to its primary source.

## Sections
- [Front page](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/index.html)
- [Story archive](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/all.html): every story, searchable
- [The Docket](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/events.html): upcoming court dates, earnings, deadlines
- [RSS feed](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/rss.xml)

## Latest stories
- [Polymarket advances U.S. return with new margin trading framework](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-advances-u-s-return-with-new-margin-trading-framework.html): Polymarket is moving closer to a formal U.S. relaunch by developing a margin trading plan, marking the prediction market platform's most concrete step yet toward re-entering the American market.
- [Canadians View Prediction Markets as Gambling Despite Sector Growth](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/canadians-view-prediction-markets-as-gambling-despite-sector-growth.html): A Yahoo! Finance Canada report finds that most Canadians still categorize prediction markets as gambling, even as platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi expand globally in 2025.
- [Kalshi TikTok ads target Love Island viewers in prediction market push](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-tiktok-ads-target-love-island-viewers-in-prediction-market-push.html): Kalshi is running a wave of prediction-market betting advertisements on TikTok aimed at Love Island fans, according to Business Insider, marking an aggressive social-media push to recruit younger users.
- [Cboe targets prediction market users for options trading conversion](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/cboe-targets-prediction-market-users-for-options-trading-conversion.html): Cboe Global Markets is actively pursuing prediction market participants as a pipeline for converting retail traders into options customers, the exchange operator revealed in a strategy disclosure reported by Traders Magazine.
- [North Carolina law recognizes CFTC federal authority over prediction markets](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/north-carolina-law-recognizes-cftc-federal-authority-over-prediction-markets.html): North Carolina enacted legislation formally acknowledging the CFTC's preemptive federal regulatory authority over prediction markets, making it one of the first U.S. states to codify that distinction into state law.
- [Kalshi seeks regulatory approval to expand perpetual event contracts](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-seeks-regulatory-approval-to-expand-perpetual-event-contracts.html): Prediction market operator Kalshi is in active discussions with U.S. regulators to extend its never-expiring derivatives products into new market categories, Reuters reported exclusively.
- [Polymarket Files for US Margin Trading License on Event Contracts](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-files-for-us-margin-trading-license-on-event-contracts.html): Polymarket has submitted regulatory applications to offer margin trading on prediction-market contracts to US users, marking its most direct push yet toward legal domestic operations.
- [Wall Street Banks Ban Staff from Trading Prediction Markets](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/wall-street-banks-ban-staff-from-trading-prediction-markets.html): Major Wall Street banks have issued internal rules prohibiting employees from trading on prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket, citing conflicts of interest and compliance concerns, according to Reuters.
- [Davis Wright Tremaine: Insider Trading Risk Now Hits Prediction Markets](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/davis-wright-tremaine-insider-trading-risk-now-hits-prediction-markets.html): Law firm Davis Wright Tremaine published a compliance alert warning that insider trading rules now materially apply to prediction markets, urging platforms and participants to update their programs immediately.
- [Goldman, firms grapple with insider trading rules as prediction markets grow](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/goldman-firms-grapple-with-insider-trading-rules-as-prediction-markets-grow.html): Goldman Sachs and other major companies are actively developing internal policies to address insider trading risks posed by employee participation in prediction markets, according to CNBC.
